auc: 0.928 (95% CI: 0.917 - 0.939) for standalone performance; 0.915 (95% CI: 0.874 - 0.955) for CAD-assisted clinical interpretation
intended_use: Lunit INSIGHT DBT is a computer-assisted detection and diagnosis (CADe/x) software intended to be used concurrently by interpreting physicians to aid in the detection and characterization of suspected
intended_use_full: Lunit INSIGHT DBT is a computer-assisted detection and diagnosis (CADe/x) software intended to be used concurrently by interpreting physicians to aid in the detection and characterization of suspected lesions for breast cancer in digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) exams from compatible DBT systems. Through the analysis, the regions of soft tissue lesions and calcifications are marked with an abnormality score indicating the likelihood of the presence of malignancy for each lesion. Lunit INSIGHT DBT uses screening mammograms of the female population.
ground_truth: Reference standards established through binary classification based on clinical supporting data (pathology reports for cancer and biopsy-proven benign cases) with lesion localization derived from radiologic review and annotation by multiple MQSA qualified ground truthers.
other_metrics: Standalone performance AUROC exceeded predicate device mean AUROC of 0.903 (p < 0.0001). Clinical assessment showed inter-test difference of 0.017 (95% CI: 0.000 - 0.034, P = 0.0498) comparing CAD-unassisted AUROC 0.897 to CAD-assisted AUROC 0.915.
